'''Boss Banjeer''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of [[Baramorra]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
His uncle was [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Llon Banjeer]], and when the latter was placed on the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], he placed his nephew in control of [[Baramorra]] and all [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] in its [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. When the elders of Baramorra objected, the Boss had them all executed. He also engaged in business with [[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. In 11 ABY, [[Kir Kanos]] under the guise of [[Kir Kanos|Kenix Kil]] came to Baramorra, answering Banjeer's call for bounty hunters. Assuring the governor knew where Kanos was, Kil led his bounty hunters into the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] forests, [[Death/Legends|killing]] them before returning to complete the job with Banjeer.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Bounty Hunters: Kenix Kil]]'' {{1st}}
